8:  * @ai-summary Guest session lifecycle: create, validate, extend, revoke

21: 
22: export const GUEST_SESSION_COOKIE_NAME = 'guest_session'
23: 
24: export type GuestSessionDoc = GuestSession
25: 
26: export function generateSessionToken(): string {
27:   return crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex')
28: }
29: 
30: export function hashToken(token: string): string {
31:   return crypto.createHash('sha256').update(token).digest('hex')
32: }
33: 
34: export function verifyTokenHash(storedHash: string, token: string): boolean {
35:   const computedHash = hashToken(token)
36:   try {
37:     const storedBuffer = Uint8Array.from(Buffer.from(storedHash))
38:     const tokenBuffer = Uint8Array.from(Buffer.from(computedHash))
39:     return crypto.timingSafeEqual(storedBuffer, tokenBuffer)
40:   } catch {
41:     return false
42:   }
43: }

86:       'SameSite=Lax',
87:       'Path=/',
88:       `Max-Age=${maxAge}`,
89:     ]
90:       .filter(Boolean)
91:       .join('; '),
92:   )

95: export function getGuestSessionCookie(headers: Headers): string | null {
96:   if (!headers) return null
97:   const cookieHeader = headers.get('cookie')
98:   if (!cookieHeader) return null
99: 
100:   const match = cookieHeader.match(new RegExp(`${GUEST_SESSION_COOKIE_NAME}=([^;]+)`))
101:   return match?.[1] || null
102: }
103: 
104: export function clearGuestSessionCookie(headers: Headers = new Headers()): void {
105:   headers.append(
106:     'Set-Cookie',

108:       `${GUEST_SESSION_COOKIE_NAME}=`,
109:       'HttpOnly',

111:       'SameSite=Lax',
112:       'Path=/',
113:       'Max-Age=0',
114:     ]
115:       .filter(Boolean)
116:       .join('; '),
117:   )
118: }

120: export async function createGuestSession(
121:   payload: Payload,
122:   options: {
123:     ipHash?: string
124:     userAgentHash?: string
125:   },
126: ): Promise<{ session: GuestSessionDoc; token: string }> {
127:   const token = generateSessionToken()
128:   const tokenHash = hashToken(token)
129:   const now = new Date()
130: 
131:   const guestConfig = await getGuestChatConfig()
132:   const hardExpiresAt = new Date(now)
133:   hardExpiresAt.setDate(hardExpiresAt.getDate() + guestConfig.hard_cap_days)
134: 
135:   const expiresAt = new Date(now)
136:   expiresAt.setDate(expiresAt.getDate() + guestConfig.sliding_ttl_days)
137: 
138:   const session = await payload.create({
139:     collection: 'guest-sessions',
140:     data: {
141:       tokenHash,
142:       tokenVersion: 1,
143:       createdAt: now.toISOString(),
144:       lastActiveAt: now.toISOString(),
145:       expiresAt: expiresAt.toISOString(),
146:       hardExpiresAt: hardExpiresAt.toISOString(),
147:       status: 'active',
148:       messageCount: 0,
149:       ipHash: options.ipHash,
150:       userAgentHash: options.userAgentHash,
151:     },
152:     draft: false,
153:   })
154: 
155:   logger.info({ sessionId: session.id }, 'Created guest session')
156: 
157:   return { session, token }
158: }
159: 
160: export async function getGuestSessionByToken(
161:   payload: Payload,
162:   token: string,
163: ): Promise<GuestSessionDoc | null> {
164:   const tokenHash = hashToken(token)
165: 
166:   const sessions = await payload.find({
167:     collection: 'guest-sessions',
168:     where: {
169:       and: [{ tokenHash: { equals: tokenHash } }, { status: { equals: 'active' } }],
170:     },
171:     limit: 1,
172:   })
173: 
174:   if (sessions.docs.length === 0) return null
175: 
176:   const session = sessions.docs[0]
177: 
178:   if (new Date(session.expiresAt) < new Date()) {
179:     return null
180:   }
181: 
182:   return session
183: }
184: 
185: export async function updateGuestSessionActivity(
186:   payload: Payload,
187:   sessionId: string,
188: ): Promise<GuestSessionDoc | null> {
189:   const session = await payload.findByID({
190:     collection: 'guest-sessions',
191:     id: sessionId,
192:   })
193: 
194:   if (!session || session.status !== 'active') {
195:     return null
196:   }
197: 
198:   const hardExpiresAt = new Date(session.hardExpiresAt)
199:   const now = new Date()
200: 
201:   const guestConfig = await getGuestChatConfig()
202:   const newExpiresAt = new Date(now)
203:   newExpiresAt.setDate(newExpiresAt.getDate() + guestConfig.sliding_ttl_days)
204: 
205:   if (newExpiresAt > hardExpiresAt) {
206:     newExpiresAt.setTime(hardExpiresAt.getTime())
207:   }
208: 
209:   const updated = await payload.update({
210:     collection: 'guest-sessions',
211:     id: sessionId,
212:     data: {
213:       lastActiveAt: now.toISOString(),
214:       expiresAt: newExpiresAt.toISOString(),
215:     },
216:   })
217: 
218:   return updated
219: }

221: export async function revokeGuestSession(
222:   payload: Payload,
223:   sessionId: string,
224:   claimedByUser: string,
225: ): Promise<GuestSessionDoc | null> {
226:   const updated = await payload.update({
227:     collection: 'guest-sessions',
228:     id: sessionId,
229:     data: {
230:       status: 'revoked',
231:       claimedByUser,
232:       claimedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
233:     },
234:   })
235: 
236:   return updated
237: }

239: export interface GuestMessageLimitResult {
240:   allowed: boolean
241:   remaining: number
242:   current: number
243:   max: number
244:   blocked?: boolean
245: }
246: 
247: export async function checkAndIncrementGuestMessageCount(
248:   payload: Payload,
249:   guestSessionId: string,
250: ): Promise<GuestMessageLimitResult> {
251:   const guestConfig = await getGuestChatConfig()
252: 
253:   const session = await payload.findByID({
254:     collection: 'guest-sessions',
255:     id: guestSessionId,
256:   })
257: 
258:   if (!session) {
259:     return { allowed: false, remaining: 0, current: 0, max: guestConfig.max_messages }
260:   }
261: 
262:   // Block message creation if session is in claiming state
263:   if (session.status === 'claiming') {
264:     return {
265:       allowed: false,
266:       remaining: 0,
267:       current: session.messageCount ?? 0,
268:       max: guestConfig.max_messages,
269:       blocked: true,
270:     }
271:   }
272: 
273:   const currentCount = session.messageCount ?? 0
274: 
275:   if (currentCount >= guestConfig.max_messages) {
276:     return {
277:       allowed: false,
278:       remaining: 0,
279:       current: currentCount,
280:       max: guestConfig.max_messages,
281:     }
282:   }
283: 
284:   await payload.update({
285:     collection: 'guest-sessions',
286:     id: guestSessionId,
287:     data: {
288:       messageCount: currentCount + 1,
289:     },
290:   })
291: 
292:   return {
293:     allowed: true,
294:     remaining: guestConfig.max_messages - currentCount - 1,
295:     current: currentCount + 1,
296:     max: guestConfig.max_messages,
297:   }
298: }

300: export function hashIP(ip: string | null): string {
301:   if (!ip) return ''
302:   return crypto.createHash('sha256').update(ip).digest('hex').slice(0, 16)

368:   if (sessions.docs.length === 0) return null

374:   }
375: 
376:   return session

379: /**
380:  * Acquire claim lock atomically via compare-and-set
381:  * Transitions session from 'active' to 'claiming'
382:  */
383: export async function acquireClaimLock(
384:   payload: Payload,
385:   sessionId: string,
386:   claimingUserId: string,
387: ): Promise<ClaimLockResult> {
388:   // First try to atomically transition from active to claiming
389:   try {
390:     const updated = await payload.update({
391:       collection: 'guest-sessions',
392:       where: {
393:         and: [{ id: { equals: sessionId } }, { status: { equals: 'active' } }],
394:       },
395:       data: {
396:         status: 'claiming',
397:         claimedByUser: claimingUserId,
398:       },
399:     })
400: 
401:     if (updated.docs.length > 0) {
402:       // Lock acquired successfully
403:       return {
404:         locked: true,
405:         session: updated.docs[0] as unknown as GuestSessionDoc,
406:       }
407:     }
408:   } catch {
409:     // Update failed, session might not exist or status changed
410:   }
411: 
412:   // Lock not acquired - check current state to determine reason
413:   const session = await payload.findByID({
414:     collection: 'guest-sessions',
415:     id: sessionId,
416:     depth: 0,
417:   })
418: 
419:   if (!session) {
420:     // Session doesn't exist
421:     return { locked: false, alreadyCompleted: true }
422:   }
423: 
424:   if (session.status === 'revoked') {
425:     // Already completed (claimed by user)
426:     return { locked: false, alreadyCompleted: true }
427:   }
428: 
429:   if (session.status === 'claiming') {
430:     // Someone else is already claiming
431:     if (session.claimedByUser === claimingUserId) {
432:       // Same user can resume
433:       return {
434:         locked: true,
435:         session: session as unknown as GuestSessionDoc,
436:         resumed: true,
437:       }
438:     }
439:     // Different user claiming - cannot proceed
440:     return { locked: false, inProgress: true }
441:   }
442: 
443:   // Session is active but update failed (concurrent modification)
444:   return { locked: false, inProgress: true }
445: }
446: 
447: /**
448:  * Complete claim lock - transitions from 'claiming' to 'revoked'
449:  * Only called after successful transfer of all conversations
450:  */
451: export async function completeClaimLock(
452:   payload: Payload,
453:   sessionId: string,
454:   userId: string,
455: ): Promise<GuestSessionDoc | null> {
456:   try {
457:     const updated = await payload.update({
458:       collection: 'guest-sessions',
459:       where: {
460:         and: [{ id: { equals: sessionId } }, { status: { equals: 'claiming' } }],
461:       },
462:       data: {
463:         status: 'revoked',
464:         claimedByUser: userId,
465:         claimedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
466:       },
467:     })
468: 
469:     if (updated.docs.length > 0) {
470:       return updated.docs[0] as unknown as GuestSessionDoc
471:     }
472:   } catch {
473:     // Failed to complete lock - session might not exist
474:   }
475: 
476:   return null
477: }
